name: freemodel-cc-proxy
description: Local Claude proxy over FreeModel's cc.freemodel.dev — Anthropic Messages API (/v1/messages) AND OpenAI Chat Completions API (/v1/chat/completions), streaming + non-streaming, for any client (Factory Droid, Claude Code, Cline, Cursor, Anthropic SDK, OpenAI SDK) by impersonating the official Claude Code request fingerprint.
author: bigdata2211it-web
